definitions.name: cost_category
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Low' when total_charges is at most 5000
  - 'Medium' when total_charges is at most 20000
  - 'High' otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN total_charges <= 5000 THEN 'Low' WHEN total_charges <= 20000 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END
